Electrician: Install and maintain electrical systems in residential and commercial buildings
Diagnose electrical problems and perform repairs safely
Ensure compliance with UAE safety regulations and standards
Plumber: Install, repair, and maintain plumbing systems
Fix leaks, clogs, and pipe issues in residential and commercial properties
Perform maintenance according to UAE building codes
Construction Laborer: Assist with on-site construction tasks and manual labor
Handle materials, equipment, and tools safely
Support skilled workers like masons and carpenters in project completion
Carpenter: Cut, shape, and assemble wooden structures and furniture
Repair or replace damaged wooden components
Follow project plans and safety protocols in UAE construction sites
Cleaner / Janitor: Maintain cleanliness of residential, office, or industrial spaces
Handle waste disposal and sanitation tasks
Follow hygiene and safety standards required in UAE workplaces
Driver: Transport goods or passengers safely according to UAE traffic rules
Maintain and check vehicle condition regularly
Plan routes efficiently and adhere to schedules
Security Guard: Monitor and secure residential or commercial premises
Control access and report security incidents
Follow UAE security regulations and emergency protocols
